commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://efa-validation-<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>/manifests/stage4/node-cleanup-160.yaml /tmp/node-cleanup-160.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod node-cleanup-160 -n efa-validation --ignore-not-found --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs node-cleanup-160 -n efa-validation 2>&1 | tail -30'
